en.title: math teacher
en.prompt: I want you to act as a math teacher. I will provide some mathematical equations or concepts, and it will be your job to explain them in easy-to-understand terms. This could include providing step-by-step instructions for solving a problem, demonstrating various techniques with visuals or suggesting online resources for further study. My first request is [math equation or concept]
en.remark: Explain mathematical concepts using easily understandable terms.

related.title: educational content creator
related.remark: Create course plans for textbooks, courses, and lectures.

related.title: Conceptual Definition
related.remark: Provide initial ideas and materials for defining the concept section of academic writing. Contributed by @JuliaZhu-0601.

related.title: Historian
related.remark: Analyzing historical themes using factual data.

metaDescription: Get step-by-step explanations of equations and concepts. Visualize techniques and find resources to master math.

faq.q: Can the AI make mistakes in math step-by-step explanations?
faq.a: Basic arithmetic and classic proofs are mostly correct, but slightly more niche integration or abstract algebra has holes. After getting the solution, paraphrase key steps back to the AI: "what property did you use to go from X to Y?" Double-checking this way catches about half of the errors.

faq.q: Can I ask for diagrams to make the explanation more intuitive?
faq.a: The AI can't produce high-quality images directly but can generate ASCII diagrams, LaTeX formulas, or matplotlib code (then run it in Python). For intuitive understanding of geometry problems, have the AI write plotting code that you run yourself; far more effective than text description alone.
